name: The Aurelian Empire:  A Clash of Ice and Fire
description:
Five years ago, a broken princess crossed the border between kingdoms, carried on the shockwave of a dying Sword King’s final act of love. Behind her: a massacre orchestrated by shadow and deceit. Ahead: an empire that shares her blood—and her thirst for justice.

Five years ago, the Aurelian Empire learned their lost princess had been tortured, isolated, and nearly destroyed by the very kingdom that should have protected her. They learned Celestine’s daughter had survived seventeen years of psychological warfare. They learned she watched her husband die on their wedding day.

Five years ago, Empress Augusta adopted her niece and swore an oath: Sera would answer for what it had done.

But Sera did not stand idle. Fearing imperial expansion, King Aldric reached across the ocean to the Empire of Vados an empire from another continent that had unmatched power, with a ruler whose magic transcends mortal comprehension. In exchange for military aid against “Aurelian aggression,” Sera offered Vados their first foothold on a new continent. Sera itself.

The stage is set. Six legions march from the center under Sol-Leo Invictus. Frost moves from the east under the Frost Sovereign. Between them: a kingdom built on lies, ruled by a Mind Mage whose web of control has kept her hidden for decades.

The war begins at the border.

But the true battle? That was decided the moment they killed the man she loved.

And 5 years ago in a powerful empire of a distant continent, a Northern Star woke in a foreign prince’s bed drugged and screaming the name of a woman he shouldn’t know.

POWER SYSTEMS

SWORD MASTERY HIERARCHY

The path of the blade—where will determines reality and steel becomes philosophy.

Untrained → Novice → Competent → Expert

The foundation. Guards, soldiers, duelists. Competent fighters handle multiple opponents. Experts are rare and respected.

Master (5) — Aura Awakening

Manifests fighting aura (visible colored glow). Enhanced strength, speed, supernatural reflexes. Knights and elite guards. Can defeat 20+ expert fighters.

Grandmaster (6) — Aura Beast Manifestation

Spiritual projection of their sword soul—animals, mythical creatures, concepts made manifest. Ranged energy attacks. Regional celebrities. Can level buildings.

Sword Lord (7) — Regional Catastrophe

Aura Beast becomes semi-physical, fights independently. Can cut concepts—space, magic, momentum. Destroys armies. Reality-bending techniques. Duchies negotiate around them.

Sword King (8) — Continental Legend

Aura Beast achieves consciousness. Physics-defying techniques. Split islands, reshape landscapes. Living myths whose presence stops wars.

Sword Saint (9) — Once in an Era

One confirmed in 300 years. Allegedly cut fate itself. Unknown if truly achievable or exaggerated legend.

Sword God (10) — Mythical

Religious concept. Beyond mortal comprehension.

MARTIAL CULTIVATION

Where internal energy rewrites the body’s limits.

Third Rate — Beginning qi cultivation. Weakest practitioners.

Second Rate — Grasped internal energy basics. Learning combat techniques.

First Rate — Foundation complete. Beginning to shape qi. Elite warriors.

Ascendant Realm (Entry/True/Peak) — Acknowledged experts. Unleash qi into attacks. Full technique potential.

Transcendent Realm (Entry/True/Peak) — Top sect masters. Force Qi (Weapon Aura) manifestation. Energy sensing.

Tran
creator: Qjfavf
